title: Plan early for English and skills evidence
summary: For skilled migration pathways, early preparation of English results and employment evidence can materially improve timing and confidence before EOI.

title: State-based pathways remain important below the direct PR threshold
summary: Applicants below the minimum competitive profile often benefit from reviewing state and regional strategies rather than relying on a single direct PR route.

title: Clear case sequencing reduces delays
summary: A clean order of assessment, testing, EOI preparation, and nomination review helps avoid rework and missing evidence later in the process.
